message:
fix(learn): add runtime validation for all LearnMutation types + capabilities fallback

Validate required fields for each mutation type before casting to
LearnMutation: create_memory requires content, update_agent requires
agent_name and system_prompt, create_agent requires name/description/
system_prompt/model, create_routing_rule requires condition/preference/
strength. Unknown types return null.

Also adds capabilities -> tools/agents fallback for create_agent when
the LLM uses the old combined capabilities field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
